name: realistic
label: 真实实物 / Realistic
preamble: Photorealistic studio product renders: realistic materials, textures, lighting and soft reflections, crisp high detail, clean e-commerce catalog look. Each object at a similar scale, centered and isolated.

construction.grid: matched product scale; centered and isolated
construction.color_rule: natural product colours; uniform studio lighting
construction.shared_parts: consistent scale and lighting across the set
construction.shadow: perfectly flat grey backdrop, no gradient or vignette

fits: E-commerce product tiles, landing heroes. These are product images more than icons.
notes: Insist on a perfectly flat grey backdrop with no gradient or vignette. rembg cuts objects and people cleanly.
